---
title: "Experiment Readouts"
subtitle: "Test vs. control, lift with confidence intervals, significance reads"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  id: patterns-listing
  contents: "*.qmd"
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [image, title, categories, description]
---

::: {.section-label}
Analysis Playbook · Experiment Readouts
:::

Reading a test without fooling yourself — lift with confidence intervals, the
difference between "the test won" and "the test probably won," and how to present a
null result.

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**🚧 In progress** — entries coming soon.
:::

::: {#patterns-listing}
:::
